import functools
from cachetools import TTLCache, LRUCache

# Max 1000 users, evicts LRU entries when full
user_cache: LRUCache[int, dict] = LRUCache(maxsize=1000)

# Max 500 products, entries expire after 5 minutes
product_cache: TTLCache[int, dict] = TTLCache(maxsize=500, ttl=300)

# Max 100 sessions, entries expire after 1 hour
session_cache: TTLCache[str, dict] = TTLCache(maxsize=100, ttl=3600)


@functools.lru_cache(maxsize=256)
def get_user(user_id: int):
    return fetch_user_from_db(user_id)


class ProductCatalog:
    """Product cache with LRU eviction at 500 entries."""

    def __init__(self):
        self._products: LRUCache = LRUCache(maxsize=500)
        self._categories: LRUCache = LRUCache(maxsize=100)

    def get_product(self, product_id: int):
        if product_id not in self._products:
            self._products[product_id] = load_product(product_id)
        return self._products[product_id]
